seoTitle: Highworth vs Hillcrest — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Highworth and Hillcrest. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Highworth and Hillcrest.
heading: Highworth vs Hillcrest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Highworth, Queensland and Hillcrest, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hillcrest has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Highworth (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Highworth or Hillcrest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Highworth has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Hillcrest scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Highworth scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Hillcrest scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Highworth or Hillcrest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hillcrest has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
